strengths: Meets minimum experience bar: ~19 years of software engineering across web, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems (since 2006)
Entrepreneurial track record: founded GISCollective (2016–present), an open-source geo-data platform adopted by Green Map
Recent hands-on AI-agent work: MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks at re:cinq
concerns: No director-level or principal-level scope: career history is senior/staff IC delivery roles, with no evidence of org-wide technical strategy or advising strategic customers
AI expertise is shallow and recent: no ML/AI products or platforms of recognized impact, no publications or AI credentials (bachelor's only, no Master's/PhD in AI)
Limited cloud-platform strategy evidence: AWS CDK and Kubernetes usage is tactical implementation, not cloud product vision or platform architecture leadership

key_factors.factor: Recognized AI expertise with demonstrated AI products
15+ years engineering experience with startup/founder background

response.justification: The candidate satisfies the minimum qualifications: a BS in Computer Science and roughly 19 years of engineering experience spanning low-latency DLang microservices at Dunnhumby (millions of requests/second) and full-stack product work. The founder role at GISCollective evidences the preferred entrepreneurial trait. However, the role is a director-level AI-strategy position, and the résumé shows no comparable scope: titles top out at Staff Engineer, AI involvement is limited to recent MCP/agentic tooling contributions at re:cinq rather than recognized AI products or platforms, and there is no advanced AI degree, no record of advising strategic customers, and no cloud product-strategy work. Strong senior engineer, but the evidence does not support fit for a principal AI-strategy role.
